Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment
Off Calendar May-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sally Morin, Esq., of Law Offices of James M. Millar, 981-8100, for Plaintiff and Opposing Party
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT DAVID TOGANIVALU'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT WAS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (301/JLW/ds) Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-27-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for Court trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing on this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Bura, CSR: Janet Pond.
Sally Morin, Esq. for Plaintiff: Indochinese Housing Development Corporation. Plaintiff's witness: Dean Oshida, was sworn and examined. No appearance by Defendant, David Toganivalu.
Exhibit 1---Three Day Notice----------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Proof of Service dated 2/23/06---------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: David Toganivalu as follows:
Restitution and possession of premises located at 340 Eddy St., #109, San Francisco.
Forfeiture of lease.
Past due rent: $2,681.00
Holdover damages: $485.00
Costs: $289.00
for a total of $3,455.00
Counsel stipulated to the return of Exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Off Calendar
